**BOLD signal and functional connectivity associated with loving kindness meditation.** — Brain and behavior (2014). PMID: 24944863. DOI: 10.1002/brb3.219. Score: 49. Loving kindness is aform of meditation involving directed well-wishing, typically supported by the silent repetition of phrases such as "may all beings be happy," to foster afeeling of selfless love. Here we used functional magnetic resonance imaging to assess the neural substrate of loving kindness meditation in experienced meditators and novices.
